Metadata.title: Customer Portal

errors.oauthDenied: Login was cancelled. Please try again.

AccessDeniedPage.title: Access is currently restricted
AccessDeniedPage.descriptionBlacklisted: Personal email domains are not eligible for this support portal. Please use your company email address.
AccessDeniedPage.descriptionNoMapping: We couldn't find an organization mapping for your account yet.
AccessDeniedPage.supportHint: If you believe this is incorrect, contact support to complete your organization setup.

CustomerForbiddenPage.title: Access denied
CustomerForbiddenPage.description: You do not have access to this customer workspace.

CustomerNotFoundPage.title: Customer not found
CustomerNotFoundPage.description: The customer organization you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

IssueNotFoundPage.description: This issue is missing or you do not have permission to view it.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Choose how the portal is rendered for your account.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.deleteAccountDescription: Deletes only Convex data. Linear data is never deleted.
danger.dialogDescription: Your account mapping and preferences will be removed from Convex. If no other account exists on your email domain, this organization's Convex projection data will also be removed.
